text: Hello? Hello. Hi, this is Chelsea, and I'm reaching out because we pulled up your Medicare profile, and there's a note here showing your 2026 plan update hasn't been confirmed yet. We just need a quick confirmation from you so your coverage doesn't get interrupted. Just confirm for me. Do you have both part A and part B? Chelsea, I'm 18 years old, Chelsea. Sorry, it looks like you don't qualify for the plans. Have a great day.
